What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A black BMX bike frame with purple rims sits on a concrete floor alongside detached wheels and pedals. An owner's manual lies nearby with assembly instructions visible. Tools rest on a beige surface including a chrome ratchet wrench with an extension bar. Four L-shaped hex keys are arranged by descending length next to three silver socket heads. A black open-ended wrench rests on the far left of the tool layout.

canonical_answer: At 0s, disassembled bike parts lie on concrete floor; at 6s, metal tools appear on a beige surface; at 10s, overlay reads '3/8 SOCKET WRENCH WITH EXTENSION'; at 14s, text lists Allen wrench sizes; at 18s, label shows '15MM OPEN END WRENCH'.
